case_title: STIEBER WILLIAM VS WILLIAMS KARL DBA BURLINGAME GLASS CO.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,950.00 FILED BY STIEBER WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS KARL DBA BURLINGAME GLASS CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-08-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
